name: TUF GAMING B760M-PLUS WIFI II Intel B760 LGA 1700 mATX motherboard with PCIe 5.0, three 4.0 M.2 slots, DDR5, WiFi 6E With Q-Antenna, Realtek 2.5Gb Ethernet, DisplayPort, HDMI™, SATA 6 Gbps
